story-context.title: Role-Based Access Control on API Endpoints
story-context.summary: Secure Widget API endpoints with @PreAuthorize annotations using normalized roles from RoleNormalizer (Story 3.5). Validates WIDGET_ADMIN can create/update, WIDGET_VIEWER can only read.
story-context.key-code: - WidgetController.kt with @PreAuthorize annotations - POST /api/widgets: @PreAuthorize("hasRole('WIDGET_ADMIN')") - GET /api/widgets/{id}: @PreAuthorize("hasAnyRole('WIDGET_ADMIN', 'WIDGET_VIEWER')") - PUT /api/widgets/{id}: @PreAuthorize("hasRole('WIDGET_ADMIN')") - @AuthenticationPrincipal Jwt for user context
story-context.critical-dependency: REQUIRES Story 3.5 RoleNormalizer fix (Set<GrantedAuthority> with ROLE_ prefix) WITHOUT this fix, ALL @PreAuthorize checks will FAIL
story-context.testing: Integration tests: ADMIN create/update works, VIEWER read-only works, VIEWER create fails with 403 Forbidden, Authorization test suite covers all permission combinations
